Prior to the film's worldwide exclusive distribution on Prime Video starting March 20, an event was held in Kanagawa Prefecture on March 19, where Osawa, Hiroshi Tamaki, 12 actors who played the Yamato crew, and director Kohei Yoshino gathered. The new development of the series was announced at the location with a real submarine in the background.

entries.description:
3D Animated Film "KPOP Girls! Interview with the production team about the use of UE in "Demon Hunters," published by Epic Games.
